detail.deleteModalDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this encounter? This action cannot be undone and all associated data will be permanently removed.
list.confirmDeleteMany: Are you sure you want to permanently delete these {count} encounters? All related data, including player stats, skill stats, and death events, will also be deleted.
list.confirmDeleteOne: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this encounter? All related data, including player stats, skill stats, and death events, will also be deleted.
